generated_oml:
instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control System (BCS) for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSDataTransmitted
]

instance BCSDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance BCSData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from Building Control System (BCS) sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Modeling (BIM) as foundational geometric representation enriched with Building Control System (BCS) components including sensors, actuators, and controllers defined by Building Control Engineers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) for automatic extraction of structured representations from enriched BIM models and generation of deployable DT artifacts with minimal manual intervention"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InfrastructureOptimizationService, EnhancedDecisionMakingService, CustomAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for continuous synchronization between physical and digital systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for maintenance and operational forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceForecastInsight, OperationalForecastInsight
]

instance InfrastructureOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Infrastructure optimization service for data-driven management across building lifecycle"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance EnhancedDecisionMakingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhanced decision-making capabilities for stakeholders in AECO domain"
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionMakingInsight
]

instance CustomAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Custom analytics services integrated via modular extension points for processing data to generate actionable insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomInsight
]

instance RealTimeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights for continuous monitoring and control interfaces"
]

instance MaintenanceForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance forecasts for operational planning"
]

instance OperationalForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational forecasting for resource allocation and scheduling"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Infrastructure optimization insights for energy efficiency and performance"
]

instance DecisionMakingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insights for data-driven decision-making in AECO domain"
]

instance CustomInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insights generated by custom analytics services for operational decision-making"
]

instance ModularArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for integrating custom analytics services and adapting to operational changes"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomAnalyticsService
]

instance BuildingInfrastructureSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Infrastructure assets within AECO domain integrating static models and real-time operational data for simulation, analysis, and optimization"
    base:contains BIMModel, BCSSensor, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, InfrastructureOptimizationService, EnhancedDecisionMakingService, CustomAnalyticsService
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling within BIM environments, Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) based transformation to generate deployable artifacts, and runtime operations featuring real-time data synchronization and interactive visualization. Governance involves Building Control Engineers (device modeling, control logic), Facility Managers (monitoring and operation), and DT Engineers (custom service integration), ensuring seamless phase transitions from static BIM to dynamic DTs."
]
